entries.description: Low-risk baseline diagnostics for host + workspace readiness.
entries.title: Repo Health Check
entries.workflow_text:
name: repo_health_check
description: Run lightweight repository health checks and summarize outcomes.
risk_level: low
manifest:
  purpose: Validate baseline project health before larger runs.
  tools: [system_info]
  data_scope: [repo_metadata, test_outputs]
  permissions: [read_repo]
  approval_policy: draft_only
  rate_limits:
    actions_per_hour: 30
  budgets:
    usd_cap: 1.0
  kill_switch:
    enabled: true
  audit_sink: server.audit
  failure_mode: fail_closed
steps:
  - id: smoke
    tool: system_info
    args: {}

entries.description: Fetch up to 3 URLs and produce a grounded summary brief.
entries.title: Web Research Brief
entries.workflow_text:
name: web_research_brief
description: Fetch a small set of URLs and produce a grounded summary brief.
risk_level: medium
manifest:
  purpose: Build a concise research brief from trusted URLs.
  tools: [web_retrieve]
  data_scope: [public_web_content]
  permissions: [network_read]
  approval_policy: draft_only
  rate_limits:
    actions_per_hour: 20
  budgets:
    usd_cap: 1.0
  kill_switch:
    enabled: true
  audit_sink: server.audit
  failure_mode: fail_closed
steps:
  - id: fetch_1
    tool: web_retrieve
    args:
      url: "$input.url_1"
    output: source_1
  - id: fetch_2
    tool: web_retrieve
    args:
      url: "$input.url_2"
    output: source_2
  - id: fetch_3
    tool: web_retrieve
    args:
      url: "$input.url_3"
    output: source_3
  - id: summarize
    model_call: |
      Topic: $input.topic

      Source 1:
      $source_1

      Source 2:
      $source_2

      Source 3:
      $source_3

      Return:
      1) 5 bullet summary
      2) key facts
      3) open questions
      Ground only in provided sources.
    mode: single
    output: brief

entries.description: Retrieve transcript-like text from a transcript endpoint URL.
entries.title: YouTube Transcript Fetch
entries.workflow_text:
name: youtube_transcript_fetch
description: Fetch transcript-like text from a provided URL and return a clean transcript report for downstream summarization.
risk_level: medium
manifest:
  purpose: Retrieve transcript content from a user-provided transcript endpoint and normalize it for safe reuse.
  tools: [web_retrieve]
  data_scope: [public_web_content, transcript_text]
  permissions: [network_read]
  approval_policy: draft_only
  rate_limits:
    actions_per_hour: 30
  budgets:
    usd_cap: 1.0
  kill_switch:
    enabled: true
  audit_sink: server.audit
  failure_mode: fail_closed
steps:
  - id: fetch_transcript_source
    tool: web_retrieve
    args:
      url: "$input.transcript_url"
    output: transcript_source
  - id: build_transcript_report
    model_call: |
      You are preparing structured transcript output for another skill.

      Input source (may include HTML, JSON, or plain text):
      $transcript_source

      Requirements:
      1) Determine whether transcript text is present.
      2) If present, extract and clean transcript text (remove HTML/navigation noise).
      3) Preserve timestamp lines when present.
      4) Keep output grounded strictly in the source.

      Output exactly in this structure:
      - transcript_found: yes|no
      - source_type: html|json|text|unknown
      - language: <value or unknown>
      - cleaned_transcript:
        <text or 'not_found'>
      - key_points:
        - <point 1>
        - <point 2>
        - <point 3>
      - timestamp_coverage: full|partial|none
      - notes_for_user:
        <short note, including next step when transcript_found=no>
    mode: single
    output: transcript_report
